title: baeria macrantha
intro: Baeria macrantha, also known as Desert Baeria, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones. Baeria macrantha has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and cold, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Baeria macrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health.
